surface_verification.runner: none (pure library change; covered by F0 unit tests)
surface_verification.justification: Pure framework library change: broadens the CI-supplychain risk-detector's file-match set (CI_SUPPLYCHAIN_FILE_PATTERNS) and its drift-pinned verifier copy. No web/UI/API/CLI-app surface exists to drive; behavior is fully covered by unit tests at F0 (test_ci_supplychain_detector + test_ci_supplychain_patterns_sync + test_check_ci_supplychain_ack).

behaviors.behavior: an edit to a shipped CI template (shared/templates/github-actions/**) trips is_ci_supplychain_change
a shared/templates path OUTSIDE github-actions, and a docs-nested copy, do NOT trip
the verifier _CI_SUPPLYCHAIN_PATTERNS stays byte-equal to the SSoT (both directions)
SSoT detector and verifier copy return the same verdict across the path matrix incl. the template path
the ack gate recomputes CI paths from the new pattern set without regressing existing behavior
